title: acer granatense subsp. xauense
intro: Acer granatense subsp. xauense is a subspecies of maple tree, scientifically known as a deciduous tree native to the Iberian Peninsula. The medicinal properties of Acer granatense subsp. xauense include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and astringent properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Acer granatense subsp. xauense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine, particularly in the regions where it is native.
